candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; valid top-line measure.
Not revenue; this is cost of sales.
Direct sales/revenue line and likely the primary operating revenue label.

variables.notes: Both labels represent the same top-line values. Using Net Sales first as the more direct operating revenue label, with As Reported Total Revenue as fallback if labels vary by year.

candidates.why: Direct cost of sales line.
Too broad here because it exactly equals COGS, so not SG&A overhead.
Possible overhead component, but an explicit SG&A line exists and is populated.
Explicit SG&A line and populated; per hierarchy this should be selected alone.
Overhead component, but explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.
Potential SG&A component, but appears empty and explicit SG&A row exists.
Not an expense row.

variables.notes: Selected only the explicit populated SG&A row. Excluded Operating Expenses because its values match Cost of revenues/COGS, indicating it is not overhead SG&A here.
No dedicated research and development expense line is present on the provided statements.

candidates.why: Finance-cost related, but less direct than explicit interest expense and appears empty.
Broader finance cost line; useful fallback if explicit interest expense is unavailable.
Explicit interest expense line; preferred choice.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Only a component of interest expense, not the main line.
Possible alternative interest label for some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental component, not preferred main XINT line.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the explicit Interest Expense line first, then broader finance-cost labels as fallbacks for possible reporting changes across years. Excluded lease-liability interest rows because they are components/supplemental rather than the main interest expense line.

candidates.why: Standard equity line and appears to exclude minority interest because Minority Interest is reported separately and sums to Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest.
Includes minority interest, so unsuitable for BE when MIB is separately mapped.
Balancing item, not a reported equity line.
Not equity; entire balance sheet total.

variables.notes: Total Equity is preferred because Minority Interest is separately disclosed, so BE can exclude NCI and avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not the balance sheet minority equity balance preferred for MIB.
Income statement attribution line, not the balance sheet minority equity balance preferred for MIB.
Direct balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest line.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income flow, not balance sheet minority equity.
Combined total, not standalone minority interest.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet minority interest line, which is the appropriate MIB input.
